✦ The Process

How it works

01

Donate to my page

Head to my Team Friendship fundraising page and make your donation. Every dollar goes directly to the cause. Donate here →

02

Grab your confirmation

You'll get a confirmation email from Team Friendship. Jot down your confirmation number — you'll need it for the order form below.

03

Submit your order

Fill out the form with your tier, items, and personalization. I'll confirm your donation and reach out within 48 hours. Allow 2–4 weeks for delivery.

✦ Already Have Something?

Drop something off to embroider

Have a jacket, bag, hat, or anything else you'd love to add embroidery to? I can embroider items you already own. Based on the UWS — reach out to coordinate a drop-off.

Note: Drop-off embroidery is priced separately from the fundraiser tiers. Pricing discussed on inquiry.

Inquire About Drop-Off
✅ Got it! I'll be in touch soon to coordinate.
📋 Terms & Good to Know

No Returns

All items are custom-made just for you, so all sales are final. If there's an issue with your order, reach out and I'll always make it right.

Color Variation

Thread colors may vary slightly from descriptions. I'll do my best to match but can't guarantee exact shades — I'll reach out if I'm unsure.

Design Complexity

All designs are limited to a 4×4 hoop on the Brother SE700. If your request is too complex, I'll reach out to simplify before starting.

Custom Order Approval

For $250+ custom orders, I'll share a mockup before stitching begins so we're both happy with the design.

Donation Verification

I'll verify all confirmation numbers before starting any order. If a confirmation can't be verified, I'll reach out before proceeding.

Order Expiry

Orders not confirmed within 2 weeks of submission may be cancelled. US shipping only. International orders not currently available.

Shipping

$8 flat rate shipping via USPS. Paid via Venmo @SaraCygler (last 4: 4218) after order confirmation. Free local delivery in Manhattan and NW DC.

About This Project

Stitch Please by Sara is a personal hobby project fundraising for Team Friendship. Sara reserves the right to decline any design she cannot execute on her machine.
